evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2200);try{MOS.setCfgTab('infra')}catch(e){}await w(4500);const c=document.getElementById('infraContenedor');const cards=[...c.querySelectorAll('.card')];const meZona=cards.find(cd=>/MosExpress/.test(cd.textContent||'')&&!/Premium/.test(cd.textContent||''));const almZona=cards.find(cd=>/Almac/.test(cd.textContent||'')&&!/Premium/.test(cd.textContent||''));const out={meFound:!!meZona,almFound:!!almZona};const rxSeries=/SERIES DOCUMENTALES/;if(almZona)out.almSeries=rxSeries.test(almZona.textContent||'');if(meZona){out.meSeries=rxSeries.test(meZona.textContent||'');meZona.scrollIntoView({block:'start'});}out.ov=document.documentElement.scrollWidth>innerWidth+1;await w(500);return out;})()
